title: Add comment in cell
description: Adds comments to a cell of the spreadsheet.

title: Add custom fields
description: Inserts custom fields into the document.

title: Autocomplete
description: Helps the user to input text quickly.

title: Chess
description: Inserts a Chess Board object into the document editor.

title: Clippy
description: Adds a clippy assistant to the document editor.

title: Context menu and events
description: Tracks the events of calling the context menu and clicking on its items.

title: Count words and characters
description: Counts paragraphs, words, and characters with or without spaces in the selected part of the document.

title: Extended comments
description: Pastes, edits, and removes comments and replies (with user data) in a document.

title: Get and paste html
description: Gets the document content as HTML code, modifies it, and pastes back to the document.

title: Hello world
description: Inserts the Hello world! phrase when the user presses the button.

title: Highlight code
description: Connects the highlight.js library for highlighting code syntax with the necessary language, style, and background color.

title: Invoices
description: Inserts template fields for invoice information.

title: Language tool
description: Connects the [LanguageTool](https://languagetool.org/) assistant, multilingual grammar, and style checker to check the text for grammar, style, and spell errors.

title: Load custom fields
description: Loads custom fields from the document.

title: Move cursor
description: Moves the text cursor to the document start/end.

title: OCR
description: Connects the [TesseractJS-Core library](https://tesseract.projectnaptha.com/) for extracting text from an image (*.png* *.jpg*) and inserting it into the document.

title: Photo editor
description: Connects the [Toast UI Image Editor](https://ui.toast.com/tui-image-editor) for editing images right in the document: cropping, resizing, applying effects, etc.

title: Search and change text background color
description: Searches for target text and changes its background color.

title: Search and replace on start
description: Searches for and replaces text in the document when it is reopened.

title: Search and replace
description: Searches for target text and replaces it with something else.

title: Settings
description: Protects a document using a watermark.

title: Speech
description: Converts the selected text into speech.

title: Symbol table
description: Inserts special symbols into the document.

title: Telegram
description: Connects the Telegram application for instant messaging within the ONLYOFFICE editors.

title: Templates
description: Inserts document templates generated by the Document Builder script.

title: Thesaurus
description: Connects [Big Huge Thesaurus](https://words.bighugelabs.com/) to search for word synonyms and antonyms.

title: Translator
description: Connects the [Google Translate API](https://cloud.google.com/translate?hl=ru) for translating the selected text into other languages.

title: Typograf
description: Connects the [Typograf](https://github.com/typograf/typograf) assistant to prepare text for publishing by correcting typographical errors.

title: Work with content controls content
description: Inserts the content of one content control into another.

title: Work with content controls navigation
description: Inserts content controls (automatically or manually), navigates and selects them as well as pastes text into them.

title: Work with content controls tags
description: Gets the list of content controls tags.

title: YouTube
description: Connects [youtube iframe\_api](https://developers.google.com/youtube/iframe_api_reference) for embedding YouTube videos into documents as OLE objects and managing them by adjusting their size, rotating, and changing position.

title: Zotero
description: Connects a Zotero account for adding references to the document in full accordance with the chosen style guides.
